description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push to the master branch, on pull requests, and daily at 12:00 UTC. The workflow has two jobs: lint and build. The lint job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the code, sets up Python 3.6, installs dependencies, and lints Python files. The build job uses a matrix strategy with multiple test environments, runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the code, sets up Python 3.6, installs dependencies including z3-solver and angr, builds the project with cmake and make, and runs nosetests for each test environment.
